input_dict.agent_role: Integrate second-hop evidence with first-hop context and retain the facts needed to answer the question.
input_dict.question: What is the nationality of UFOlogist who is credited with being among the first to claim contact with Nordic aliens in the mid 1950s?
input_dict.current_output: George Adamski was Polish American. Passage [1] corroborates this, explicitly calling him a "Polish American citizen" who claimed to have met "Nordic alien Space Brothers."

upstream_context.question: What is the nationality of UFOlogist who is credited with being among the first to claim contact with Nordic aliens in the mid 1950s?
upstream_context.summary_1: Bridge entity: George Adamski. Evidence that he is the contactee: "UFOlogist George Adamski is credited with being among the first to claim contact with Nordic aliens in the mid 1950s" (passage [1]). hop2_docs: George Adamski | George Adamski (17 April 1891 – 23 April 1965) was a Polish American citizen who became widely known in ufology circles, and to some degree in popular culture, after he claimed to have photographed spaceships from other planets, met with friendly Nordic alien Space Brothers, and to have taken flights with them to the Moon and other planets.
Jan Adamski | Jan Adamski (born 11 October 1943) is a Polish chess player who won the Polish Chess Championship in 1982.  FIDE International Master (1976).
Kazimierz Adamski | Kazimierz Adamski (born 1964) is a Polish sculptor.
Adamski (surname) | Adamski (Polish feminine: Adamska, plural: Adamscy) may refer to:

Mariusz Adamski | Mariusz "Mike" Adamski (born January 10, 1974) is a Polish aerial photographer who has flown many times with the Polish Air Force at Krzesiny Air Base.  He is a graduate of the National Defense University in Warsaw, Poland.  Adamski's works have been published in books, postage stamps, important journals and aviation publications, such as "Aviation Week & Space Technology", "Air Forces Monthly" and "Flight International".
Wiesław Adamski | Wiesław Adamski (26 July 1947 – 10 February 2017) was a Polish sculptor.

Stanisław Adamski | Stanisław Adamski (12 April 1875 - 12 November 1967) was a Polish bishop, politician, and social and political activist of the Union of Catholic Societies of Polish Workers (Związek Katolickich Towarzystw Robotników Polskich), founder and editor of the 'Robotnik' (Worker) weekly.
